scripts.build: npm run typecheck && esbuild frontend/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=src/kaleidoscope/static/index.js && esbuild frontend/styles.css --bundle --outfile=src/kaleidoscope/static/index.css
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run fmt:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.fmt: oxfmt frontend tests/frontend tests/e2e benchmarks/browser.ts benchmarks/run_browser.mjs playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json
scripts.lint: oxlint frontend tests/frontend tests/e2e benchmarks playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && PATH="$PWD/.venv/bin:$PATH" hatch run test:e2e-fixture && playwright test
